arts.ttl: James Maddison and two Tottenham players can avoid Premier League ban on one condition
arts.sum: Both players are currently on four and should they receive a yellow card against Wolves, they will be suspended for the visit of the in-form Newcastle on January 4. Yves Bissouma is the only Tottenham player who has been forced to miss a game after reaching five bookings but Spurs have three players currently on four.

arts.ttl: I played for every Spurs boss from Pochettino to Postecoglou - this is what they were like - football.london
arts.sum: He does, though, hold an opinion on all of the coaches who tried their luck managing Spurs after Pochettino was sacked by the club in November 2019 – with none of them fortunate enough to end the club's trophy drought. While he only made 14 appearances under Ange Postecoglou, Pochettino, Mourinho and Santo, Sessegnon made 42 appearances under the Italian manager.

arts.ttl: Tottenham and Wolves fans facing travel chaos as warning sent to supporters
arts.sum: Travelling to Sunday's Premier League game at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium could be difficult for thousands of supporters because of planned rail engineering works

arts.ttl: Report: Tottenham pondering cut-price move for 'incredibly fast' defender likened to Jan Vertonghen
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are currently in the midst of a major defensive crisis that has seen all four of their senior centre-backs ruled out. Tottenham went...

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou reveals Mikey Moore and Richarlison return dates and Tottenham injury review
arts.sum: Revealing ahead of the Boxing Day game against Nottingham Forest that Ben Davies had returned to training and would potentially be available for Sunday's fixture at home to Wolves, the Australian confirmed on Friday morning that the experienced centre-back had sustained another issue in training and would now face another couple of weeks on the sidelines . Due to the amount of injuries Tottenham have picked up this season and with players unfortunately sustaining further setbacks, Postecoglou was asked if he looks at his methods and the medical department when the same injuries are happening so often.

arts.ttl: ‘I’ve played for every Spurs boss since Mauricio Pochettino – this is what they’re like'
arts.sum: There have been five permanent Tottenham Hotspur managers since 2019, and one footballer managed to play under all five throughout his time in north London

arts.ttl: Tottenham receive new Djed Spence red card referee verdict after Nottingham Forest loss
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur have been informed that Djed Spence was rightly sent off during their 1-0 defeat to Nottingham Forest in the Premier League. The full-back seemed bemused after being sent off but former Premier League referee Dermot Gallagher was confident the right decision was made.
